message:
chore: add .env*.local to gitignore

Ensure local environment files with sensitive configuration
(like API keys, secrets) are not accidentally committed.

Pattern .env*.local covers:
- .env.local
- .env.development.local
- .env.production.local
- .env.test.local

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -53,3 +53,4 @@ test-results/
 
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
+.env*.local
